docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2018 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CARPET
REMARK: RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - SENT TO DEFENDANT UNABLE TO FORWARD.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN (506). APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CARPET REPRESENTED BY JOHN WILSON, PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF FILED DECLARATION WAIVING AMOUNT OVER $5000 THEREFORE NO APPEARANCE NECESSARY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,794.84 FILED BY CALIFORNIA CARPET AS TO DEFENDANT BONSIGNOLB, LOUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF CALIFORNIA CARPET FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CARPET

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CARPET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BONSIGNOLB, LOUIS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,115.00, FOR UNPAID INVOICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED AUG-20-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BONSIGNOLB, LOUIS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2018 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO OCT-31-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CARPET IS PRESENT AND REPRESENTED BY JOHN WILSON IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT LOUIS BONSIGNOLB. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED. CALIFORNIA CARPET MAY, BEFORE THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE, FILE A DECLARATION STATING THAT IT WAIVES RECOVERY ABOVE $5000.00 PLUS COSTS OR MAY DISMISS THE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. CALIFORNIA CARPET NEED NOT APPEAR AT THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE IF A FILING IS DONE BEFORE THE OCTOBER 31 HEARING.
